title: So much more positive now
summary: Soldotna woman celebrates smoke-free anniversary Sandra Simons hugs her mom during the celebration. Kandy Dushkin has overcome many challenges in her life. She can add quitting a 40-year habit to the list. Dushkin recently celebrated a year of being smoke-free with a gathering at the Dena’ina Wellness Center. “I had been trying since 2004,” Dushkin said. “… I’ve tried two weeks, a day, I even made it four months back in 2017.” Dushkin said...
